name: Daniel Xu
shortBio: Covers Hangzhou, Nanjing, and Qingdao with a focus on city mood, heritage districts, food rhythm, and calmer first-trip pacing.
fullBio: Daniel Xu is an East China editor at China Travel Notes. He leads Hangzhou, Nanjing, and Qingdao coverage, especially pages where local atmosphere, heritage districts, lake-or-coast pacing, and practical hotel geography matter more than trophy attraction collecting.
reviewProcess: Daniel reviews pages for day shape, district usefulness, and whether a city's calmer cultural strengths are being explained clearly enough to earn traveler time.
seoDescription: Read Hangzhou, Nanjing, and Qingdao city coverage by Daniel Xu at China Travel Notes.
